title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
key_components: Skill library for storing and retrieving complex behaviors
Iterative prompting mechanism that generates executable code for embodied control
features: Masters a wide range of skills
Makes new discoveries continually without human intervention
Uses code as action space instead of low-level motor commands
Interacts with blackbox LLM (GPT-4) through prompting and in-context learning
key_achievements: First LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent
Can solve novel tasks from scratch
Continually discovers new items and skills
